items.title: The electric scooter rental company Lime has filed for IPO
items.summary: The startup has expanded to more than 230 cities across the world, but has yet to become profitable.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: GM agrees to pay $12.75M in California driver privacy settlement
items.summary: General Motors has reached a privacy-related settlement with a group of law enforcement agencies led by California Attorney General Rob Bonta.
